sizing_rule.note: Ralph Vince cumulative probability-based optimal f formula. Position size = (1 / (ABS((x - 0.02) * 2.76)^1.78 + 1))^power. Requires known probability distribution parameters. Optimal f derived from cumulative probability function; Kelly fraction and max drawdown tolerance not specified by author.

source_rule_text: Position size is determined by a cumulative probability function that scales fractional position sizing based on the ratio of profit/loss parameters and exponent values.
